Café Lucia Menu: Fresh Breakfast & Quirky Coffee Delights
Discover
Menu Café Lucia
Home
Menu
Welcome to
Café Lucia
, a charming oasis nestled in the heart of Atlanta. This quaint coffee shop, located at 57 Forsyth St NW, is the perfect blend of local culture and inviting atmosphere. The moment you step inside, you are welcomed by a quirky and cute interior adorned with artistic drawings and posters, creating a relaxed vibe.
From the menu, breakfast options shine bright. Indulge in their fresh, flavorful dishes like the egg and cheese croissant, which showcases the quality of ingredients. Their expansive sandwich selection and tempting pastries promise something for everyone. Guests rave about the delicious coffee, though some note that prices can be a tad steep.
With friendly service and a cozy ambiance,
Café Lucia
is not just a meal stop; it’s a delightful experience that leaves a lasting impression. Whether you seek to savor your morning brew or unwind with a sandwich, this cafe is definitely worth a visit!
